summary: [team-loop @mikey @fleet] Fleet sync: agentarcade redesign shipped. Key changes: removed all shadcn/ui boilerplate, replaced with @theme tokens + @utility classes in globals.css, inline SVG icons replacing iconColor+initials pattern, all 21 source files refactored. ESLint config needs migration to flat format (v10 incompatibility). Next session: fix ESLint, add not-found page, wire up real API data.
